title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 26 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 26 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 26 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 26/09/2025
DCE iron ore futures were in the doldrums today. The most-traded contract I2601 closed at 790 yuan/mt, down 1.74% WoW. Traders showed moderate willingnessto sell, while steel mills' wait-and-see senment intensified, with some mills restocking at low levels.
